inventory.name: harnessHeader
inventory.how: md-template heading describing the mulberry32/arb/forAll harness

inventory.name: NUM_RUNS
inventory.how: constant 300

inventory.name: mulberry32
inventory.how: seeded mulberry32 PRNG: imul/xor bit-mixing returns [0,1) generator

inventory.name: arb
inventory.how: generator factory: DataView random-bit doubles, messy viewBox/points/transform/path/node/svgDoc/cellSrc string builders

inventory.name: forAll
inventory.how: property-check loop: runs gen(rng)->prop, throws JSON counterexample on first failure

inventory.name: checkLens
inventory.how: runs lensLaws.getPut/putGet/putPut via forAll over genS/genA with eq predicates

inventory.name: testsHeader
inventory.how: md`## Tests` section heading

inventory.name: test_viewBoxLens_laws
inventory.how: checkLens(viewBoxLens) over arb.viewBoxStr/rect, seed 0x5EED0001, rectEq

inventory.name: test_pointsLens_laws
inventory.how: checkLens(pointsLens) over arb.pointsStr/points, seed 0x5EED0002, pointsEq

inventory.name: test_transformLens_laws
inventory.how: checkLens(transformLens) over arb.transformStr/mat, seed 0x5EED0003, matEq

inventory.name: test_pathLens_laws
inventory.how: checkLens(pathLens) over arb.pathStr/pathCmds, seed 0x5EED0004, pathEq

inventory.name: test_attr_laws
inventory.how: checkLens(attr('fill')) over arb.node, genA nullable attrValue, seed 0x5EED0005, nodeEq

inventory.name: test_child_laws
inventory.how: forAll over arb.nodeWithChild running lensLaws getPut/putGet/putPut for child(i), seed 0x5EED0006

inventory.name: test_compose_nodeViewBox_laws
inventory.how: checkLens(compose(requiredAttr('viewBox'),viewBoxLens)) over arb.nodeWithViewBox, seed 0x5EED0007

inventory.name: test_invert_involution
inventory.how: forAll invertibleMat: isoLaws.roundTripS + m·invert(m)≈IDENTITY via matApproxEq, seed 0x5EED0008

inventory.name: test_exact_roundtrips
inventory.how: forAll asserts Number/String and parse∘print identities for transform/path/viewBox, seed 0x5EED0009

inventory.name: test_putput_skip_rule_corner
inventory.how: loops witnessing observational PutPut holds but strict-string PutPut fails when a2=get(s), seed 0x5EED000A

inventory.name: test_applyPoint_screen_roundtrip
inventory.how: forAll invertibleMat+point: applyPoint(invert(m),applyPoint(m,p))≈p and invert(m)·m≈IDENTITY, seed 0x5EED000B

inventory.name: test_translateLens_laws
inventory.how: checkLens(translateLens) plus forAll asserting put preserves the trailing transform ops, seeds 0x5EED0010/0011

inventory.name: test_literalLens_laws
inventory.how: checkLens runs lens-law property test on literalLens("svgLens") with arb generators, mulberry32 seed, NUM_RUNS

inventory.name: test_attrTextLens_laws
inventory.how: checkLens property-tests attrTextLens(1,"transform",…) laws over arb.svgDocStr/opStr, seeded RNG

inventory.name: test_cellSourceLens_laws
inventory.how: checkLens on compose(cellAttrLens, transformLens); genA=arb.mat, eqA=matEq

inventory.name: test_source_residue_preserved
inventory.how: forAll: put through cellAttrLens leaves bytes outside literalSpan byte-identical (slice comparison)

inventory.name: test_childrenLens_laws
inventory.how: forAll lensLaws.getPut/putGet strict, PutPut only up to get-equivalence on childrenLens([0])

inventory.name: test_structural_commands
inventory.how: forAll: insertElement/deleteElement are inverse, reorderElement is a permutation, via childrenLens child counts

inventory.name: test_point_commands
inventory.how: forAll: insertPoint then deletePoint restores polygon points; parsePoints/attrVal read back

inventory.name: test_nearestSegment
inventory.how: unit asserts nearestSegment index/distance on a square, closed vs open polyline

inventory.name: test_opsLens_laws
inventory.how: forAll lensLaws on opsLens plus residue check: untouched transform ops keep verbatim spelling via printOp/regex

inventory.name: test_transform_gizmo
inventory.how: forAll: rotateAbout/scaleAbout hold centre/pivot fixed via applyPoint; repeated gestures don't grow op list

inventory.name: test_commands_commute
inventory.how: forAll: attrTextLens transform puts at disjoint token addresses commute (left===right)

inventory.name: test_scoped_path
inventory.how: table + forAll: scopedPath descends exactly one level, never leaves scope or exceeds leaf

inventory.name: test_shape_registry
inventory.how: forAll+cases: shapeLookup/svgShapes handles — resize matches scaleAbout, unmoved writes nothing, drags land, unreadable declined

inventory.name: test_shape_creation
inventory.how: forAll: shapeMarkup committed via insertElement matches shapeSpec preview; drag corner-symmetric, residue kept

inventory.name: test_domain_boundary
inventory.how: outsideDomain accepts svg/comments/entities, refuses CDATA/style/script/foreignObject; parseDoc/tokenize/childrenLens throw loudly

inventory.name: test_units_and_style
inventory.how: forAll: lengthLens keeps units + laws, styleLens declaration laws, setProperty writes where property already lives

inventory.name: test_interpolation_slots
inventory.how: slotsOf/holeSpans classify holes; mergeInterpolated moves literals, preserves \${} bytes, refuses shape mismatch; cell-domain check

inventory.name: test_refs
inventory.how: refsOf/pathOfId resolve url(#id) and href=#id to paths; dangling ref reports null target

inventory.name: test_snapRects
inventory.how: property test via forAll/mulberry32: snapRects nearest-line within tolerance, one guide per axis, plus edge cases

inventory.name: test_topmost_selection
inventory.how: table-driven cases: topmostPaths drops descendants of selected groups, order-independent, per-component prefix check

inventory.name: test_z_order
inventory.how: forAll over random svgs: zTarget+reorderElement front/back/raise/lower vs childrenLens paint order, clamped, count preserved

inventory.name: test_pen_path
inventory.how: penPath.start/lineTo/curveTo/close/mirror asserted via parsePath/printPath; mirror involution, degenerate cubic sampled on segments

inventory.name: test_path_subdivision_exact
inventory.how: forAll mixed abs/rel/smooth paths: splitPathSegment reparameterises exactly per-segment, deletePathAnchor removes one, via print/parse round-trip

inventory.name: test_rebasePath
inventory.how: forAll: rebasePath follows each sibling's bytes across insert/delete/move using nodeAt slices; delete nulls only the removed path

inventory.name: test_group_ungroup
inventory.how: forAll: groupElements∘ungroupElements = id, cmdGroup.plan rebase follows every sibling via nodeAt bytes, contiguous is byte-exact

inventory.name: test_rebase_vertex
inventory.how: forAll polygons + fixed paths: vertexAddress print/parse round-trip, rebaseVertex follows points through insert/delete via ordinals

inventory.name: test_copy_paste
inventory.how: forAll: copyMarkup/pasteMarkup byte-identical duplicate; freshenIds renames internal refs not outward; empty-clipboard cmdPaste declines

inventory.name: test_path_smooth
inventory.how: forAll polylines: pathSmooth.toggle round-trips to original bytes, couple keeps partner length, declines arcs/endpoints

inventory.name: test_align_commands
inventory.how: mock env of boxes: cmdAlign/cmdDistribute land edges/even gaps via gestureDelta, idempotent, decline two-element distribute

inventory.name: test_parse_vs_DOMParser
inventory.how: compares parseDoc/tokenize/attrVal against DOMParser on 8 docs (shape/attrs/spans); asserts outsideDomain refuses CDATA/script/style

inventory.name: coreHeader
inventory.how: md`## Lens core` section heading

inventory.name: lens
inventory.how: constructor (get,put)=>({get,put})

inventory.name: compose
inventory.how: lens composition: get chains inner∘outer, put threads back put through outer.get/outer.put

inventory.name: isoToLens
inventory.how: lifts an iso to a lens: lens(i.to, (a,_s)=>i.from(a))

inventory.name: lensLaws
inventory.how: getPut/putGet/putPut law predicates for equality-checking a lens

inventory.name: isoLaws
inventory.how: roundTripS/roundTripA law predicates for an iso

inventory.name: svgHeader
inventory.how: md`## SVG lenses` section heading stating printing/parsing/totality conventions

inventory.name: parseNumList
inventory.how: split string on whitespace/commas, Number() each, throw on NaN

inventory.name: parseViewBox
inventory.how: parseNumList then require exactly 4 → {minX,minY,width,height}

inventory.name: printViewBox
inventory.how: map rect fields to String and join with spaces

inventory.name: rectEq
inventory.how: field-wise === comparison of two viewBox rects

inventory.name: viewBoxLens
inventory.user: Editing viewBox stays in sync with the drawing
inventory.how: lens(parseViewBox, put); preserves source string when parsed rect unchanged

inventory.name: parsePoints
inventory.how: parseNumList, require even count, pair into [x,y] tuples

inventory.name: printPoints
inventory.how: map [x,y] tuples to `x,y` and join with spaces

inventory.name: pointsEq
inventory.how: length + element-wise coordinate === comparison

inventory.name: pointsLens
inventory.user: Dragging polygon/polyline points rewrites points source
inventory.how: lens(parsePoints, put); reuses source string when parsed points unchanged

inventory.name: hMatrices
inventory.how: md`### Matrices and the CTM` heading intro to affine matrix section

inventory.name: IDENTITY
inventory.how: the constant [1,0,0,1,0,0]

inventory.name: matEq
inventory.how: element-wise === over the two flat matrices

inventory.name: multiply
inventory.how: compose two [a,b,c,d,e,f] affine matrices via explicit product formula

inventory.name: applyPoint
inventory.how: apply affine matrix to (x,y): [ax+cy+e, bx+dy+f]

inventory.name: ctmMat
inventory.how: read DOMMatrix .a-.f into a flat [a,b,c,d,e,f] array

inventory.name: opToMat
inventory.how: switch over transform op name (matrix/translate/scale/rotate/skew) → matrix; rotate-about via multiply

inventory.name: hTransforms
inventory.how: md`### Transforms and the gizmo` heading intro to transform-list/gizmo section

inventory.name: parseTransform
inventory.how: regex over transform ops, folds each via opToMat+multiply into a matrix; asserts leftovers are separators

inventory.name: printTransform
inventory.how: serialize matrix array to `matrix(a b c d e f)` string

inventory.name: transformLens
inventory.user: drag-edits round-trip to the transform attribute
inventory.how: lens(parseTransform, put) with matEq skip-rule to preserve unchanged text

inventory.name: parseTransformOps
inventory.how: regex extracts each op with name, args, and byte offsets (start/end/argStart/argEnd) for splicing

inventory.name: translateLens
inventory.user: drag translates a shape, rewriting its translate() minimally
inventory.how: lens reads/writes leading translate op; splices args in-place via offsets or prepends; skip-rule on unchanged

inventory.name: printOp
inventory.how: serialize one op to `name(args)` string

inventory.name: opsLens
inventory.user: edit the ordered op list, preserving untouched op source text
inventory.how: lens over parseTransformOps array; per-op same() reuses original byte-slice else reprints; skip-rule

inventory.name: opSlot
inventory.how: find index of last op matching name, else return ops.length (append slot)

inventory.name: holdFixed
inventory.user: transform keeps the grabbed point pinned under the cursor
inventory.how: applyPoint before/after, computes delta, adjusts leading translate to cancel drift; avoids translate(0 0) noise

inventory.name: setGizmoOp
inventory.how: insert/replace op at its slot; folds inner ops to map center; rotate gets computed cx,cy args

inventory.name: rotateAbout
inventory.user: rotate a shape about a chosen pivot point
inventory.how: setGizmoOp('rotate') then holdFixed to pin pivot

inventory.name: scaleAbout
inventory.user: scale a shape about a chosen anchor point
inventory.how: setGizmoOp('scale') then holdFixed to pin anchor

inventory.name: rotateHandle
inventory.user: a rotate handle on a stalk above the selection
inventory.how: compute stalk length from bbox, return handle at top-center with link point

inventory.name: transformHandles
inventory.user: corner scale handles plus a rotate handle around selection
inventory.how: map bbox corners to nw/ne/se/sw scale handles, append rotateHandle

inventory.name: hInverse
inventory.how: md`### Inverse, and reading a node` section heading with intro prose

inventory.name: det
inventory.how: 2x3 affine matrix determinant m0*m3-m1*m2

inventory.name: invert
inventory.how: invert affine matrix via determinant; throws if singular/non-finite

inventory.name: invertIso
inventory.how: iso {to:invert, from:invert} exploiting inversion as its own involution

inventory.name: matApproxEq
inventory.how: element-wise abs diff with scale-relative epsilon tolerance

inventory.name: nodeEq
inventory.how: recursive deep-equality over {tag,attrs,children} node tree

inventory.name: attr
inventory.how: lens factory: get/set attrs[name], null deletes, immutable spread

inventory.name: requiredAttr
inventory.how: lens factory: get throws if attr absent, set spreads attrs[name]

inventory.name: child
inventory.how: lens factory: get/set children[i] with bounds-check, immutable slice

inventory.name: hPathData
inventory.how: md heading '### Path data'

inventory.name: PATH_ARG_COUNT
inventory.how: const map of SVG path command letter to arg count

inventory.name: pathEq
inventory.how: length + per-command letter/args deep equality

inventory.name: parsePath
inventory.user: Pen/vertex tools edit path 'd' as commands
inventory.how: regex tokenizes d into {c,a}, validates arg-count multiples via PATH_ARG_COUNT

inventory.name: printPath
inventory.how: join {c,a} commands back into a d-attribute string

inventory.name: pathLens
inventory.user: Drawing a path rewrites its d source minimally
inventory.how: lens(parsePath, put reprints only if pathEq differs to preserve source)

inventory.name: sourceHeader
inventory.how: md '## Source lenses' section with lens table and acorn-offset explanation

inventory.name: literalSpan
inventory.how: acorn.parseExpressionAt walks AST to template-literal byte span; rejects element-position holes

inventory.name: literalSafe
inventory.how: holeSpans check: text minus holes must lack backtick/backslash/${ to survive re-parse

inventory.name: literalLens
inventory.user: Editing a shape rewrites the cell's own template source
inventory.how: lens over literalSpan byte-slice; put splices new text after literalSafe guard

inventory.name: hTokenizer
inventory.how: md heading '### The document: tokenizer and tree'

inventory.name: scan
inventory.how: forgiving char scanner over SVG text yielding open/close/comment/text tokens with attr byte spans

inventory.name: outsideDomain
inventory.how: scans tokens; returns reason if script/style/foreignObject/CDATA/DOCTYPE-subset present

inventory.name: tokenize
inventory.how: outsideDomain guard, then scan(src) filtered to kind==="open" tokens

inventory.name: parseDoc
inventory.how: scan(src) tokens fed through an open/close stack, building a nested tree with start/inner/end offsets and paths

inventory.name: nodeAt
inventory.how: parseDoc then walk child indices along path, throwing if any step is missing

inventory.name: pathOfIndex
inventory.how: recursive walk of parseDoc tree matching n.index===idx, returns its path

inventory.name: hAttrLenses
inventory.how: md`### ...` section heading for attribute/style/length/reference lenses

inventory.name: attrVal
inventory.how: tokenize(src)[idx].attrs[name].value or null

inventory.name: effectiveAttr
inventory.user: Shows the live computed attribute value when source has template holes
inventory.how: attrVal; if value has holeSpans, read live el.getAttribute(name) from rendered DOM element

inventory.name: spliceAttr
inventory.how: string slice replace of existing attr span, or insert ` name="val"` at el.insertPos; returns {src,span}

inventory.name: attrTextLens
inventory.user: Edit one shape attribute as text, source rewrites
inventory.how: lens(get=attrVal-or-default, put=spliceAttr with skip rule on unchanged view)

inventory.name: pathOfId
inventory.how: walk parseDoc tree matching attrs.id.value===id, returns path

inventory.name: refsOf
inventory.how: nodeAt then regex-match each attr value for url(#id) or #id, resolving id to a path via pathOfId

inventory.name: parseLength
inventory.how: regex parse of number plus optional CSS unit into {n,unit}, throws if unmatched

inventory.name: printLength
inventory.how: template `${n}${unit}`

inventory.name: lengthLens
inventory.user: Drag a unit-bearing number, source keeps its unit
inventory.how: lens(get=parseLength().n, put=printLength preserving original unit, skip when unchanged)

inventory.name: parseStyle
inventory.how: split on ; then on first : into [key,value] declaration pairs, throws on malformed

inventory.name: printStyle
inventory.how: decls.map join `k: v` with `; `

inventory.name: styleLens
inventory.user: Edit a shape's inline style declarations bidirectionally
inventory.how: lens(parseStyle, put=printStyle with deep-equal skip rule preserving original text)

inventory.name: setProperty
inventory.how: if prop already in style attr, update via styleLens.put; else return it as a standalone attribute

inventory.name: hFields
inventory.how: md section heading for the field registry

inventory.name: svgFields
inventory.user: Edit fill, stroke, opacity, dash, caps and more
inventory.how: declarative list of paint/stroke props; read() prefers style declaration over attribute via attrVal+styleLens

inventory.name: cellAttrLens
inventory.how: compose(literalLens(alias), attrTextLens) — an attribute view keyed by cell alias

inventory.name: hStructural
inventory.how: md heading introducing children lens and structural edit commands

inventory.name: childrenLens
inventory.how: lawful lens: get slices children markup, put re-splices preserving per-child gaps/indentation; skip rule on no-op

inventory.name: insertElement
inventory.user: Add a new shape to the drawing
inventory.how: childrenLens get/splice/put; clamps index, appends when at is null

inventory.name: deleteElement
inventory.user: Delete a shape from the drawing
inventory.how: childrenLens on parent path; splice out last path index; put; guards root and bounds

inventory.name: reorderElement
inventory.user: Move a shape forward or backward in stacking order
inventory.how: childrenLens splice-remove from, splice-insert at to, clamped; put

inventory.name: mintId
inventory.how: idsIn(src) set; increment prefix+i until unused

inventory.name: defsInsert
inventory.how: nodeAt finds/creates <defs> under svg root; insertElement appends markup

inventory.name: groupPlan
inventory.how: validate paths are siblings; dedupe/sort indices; compute insertion point for the group

inventory.name: groupElements
inventory.user: Group selected shapes into a <g>
inventory.how: groupPlan + childrenLens; reads source gaps, deepens indentation one level, wraps members in open/close

inventory.name: ungroupBlockers
inventory.how: nodeAt; returns reasons ungroup unsafe: not a <g>, or non-transform attrs present

inventory.name: ungroupElements
inventory.user: Ungroup a <g> back into its parent
inventory.how: guards via ungroupBlockers; dedents gaps one level; folds group transform onto each child via attrTextLens

inventory.name: copyMarkup
inventory.user: Copy selected shapes
inventory.how: nodeAt per path, slice src.start..end into markup strings

inventory.name: idsIn
inventory.how: parseDoc + recursive walk collecting attrs.id.value into a Set

inventory.name: freshenIds
inventory.how: rename colliding ids to id-2 etc; regex rewrites id=/url(#/href=#/xlink references

inventory.name: pasteMarkup
inventory.user: Paste shapes without id collisions
inventory.how: childrenLens splice-insert freshenIds(markups, idsIn(src)); clamped index; put

inventory.name: offsetMarkup
inventory.how: compose(attrTextLens(transform),translateLens); get/put translate, offset by dx/dy, round to 1e-6

inventory.name: rebaseMoves
inventory.how: path remapper: match prefix in moves list then swap, else fold rebasePath over each op

inventory.name: hPathGeometry
inventory.how: md`### Path geometry` section heading with subhead prose

inventory.name: insertPoint
inventory.user: Add a vertex to a polygon
inventory.how: attrTextLens('points') get→parsePoints→splice at after+1→printPoints→put

inventory.name: deletePoint
inventory.user: Remove a vertex from a polygon
inventory.how: attrTextLens('points') parse→splice(i,1) with min-2 guard→printPoints→put

inventory.name: nearestSegment
inventory.how: project point onto each edge, clamp t, track min hypot distance; returns index+distance

inventory.name: rebasePath
inventory.how: remaps a child index under insert/delete/move at a parent path; null if the addressed child was deleted

inventory.name: vertexAddress
inventory.how: address ADT: of/print/parse (path#a/cN), same, resolve via kind-filtered ordinal, ordinalOf from handle key

inventory.name: rebaseVertex
inventory.how: delegates structural ops to rebasePath; adjusts ordinal n for vertex-insert/delete on the same element

inventory.name: pathSegments
inventory.how: walk SVG path cmds tracking current/start/reflection points; emit normalized L/C/Q/A/Z segments with ci/o back-refs

inventory.name: pointOnSegment
inventory.how: de Casteljau interpolation at t for C/Q; chord lerp for L/Z/A

inventory.name: replaceGroup
inventory.how: splice one arg-group out of a path command, splitting into before/replacement/after commands (M→L for trailing)

inventory.name: absoluteGroup
inventory.how: rewrite a segment as an explicit absolute C/Q/A/L command via replaceGroup, so a following S/T loses its dependency

inventory.name: splitPathSegment
inventory.user: Subdivide a curve/line, adding a point
inventory.how: de Casteljau split at t into two C/Q/L (or Z→lineto); absoluteGroup on trailing S/T first; replaceGroup

inventory.name: deletePathAnchor
inventory.user: Delete an anchor point from a path
inventory.how: absoluteGroup the next segment then replaceGroup with empty; guards Z and min-2-anchors

inventory.name: nearestPathSegment
inventory.how: sample each segment (24 pts) via pointOnSegment, return closest {index,t,distance}

inventory.name: insertPathPoint
inventory.user: Insert a point on a path segment
inventory.how: attrTextLens('d') get→parsePath→splitPathSegment→printPath→put

inventory.name: deletePathPoint
inventory.user: Delete a point from a path
inventory.how: attrTextLens('d') get→parsePath→deletePathAnchor→printPath→put

inventory.name: manipulationHeader
inventory.user: Explains how dragging rewrites source without touching bytes
inventory.how: md`## Direct manipulation` prose; ref() cross-links the sinks section

inventory.name: hHandles
inventory.user: Section intro for the draggable vertex points
inventory.how: md`### Handles` heading

inventory.name: pointsHandles
inventory.how: parsePoints(attrVal points) mapped to {key,kind:anchor,x,y,i} handle objects

inventory.name: pathHandles
inventory.how: parsePath then walk M/L/H/V/C/S/Q/T/A commands tracking abs cursor, emit anchor/ctrl handles with keys

inventory.name: hShapeRegistry
inventory.user: Intro: per-tag geometry stored as data entries
inventory.how: md`### The shape registry` heading

inventory.name: numAttr
inventory.how: attrVal + Number(); throws on absent/non-finite so element leaves lens domain, keeps default

inventory.name: numText
inventory.how: String(Math.round(v*1e6)/1e6) — trim float noise to 6dp

inventory.name: geomOf
inventory.how: object of per-tag readers (rect/circle/ellipse/line) pulling numAttr fields with defaults

inventory.name: shapePoints
inventory.user: Lets you drag polygon/polyline vertices
inventory.how: registry entry: parsePoints/printPoints, reads-guard, handles=pointsHandles, edit replaces pts[h.i]

inventory.name: shapePath
inventory.user: Lets you drag path anchor and control points
inventory.how: registry entry: parsePath/printPath, handles=pathHandles, edit mutates cmd args honoring rel/base

inventory.name: rxInset
inventory.how: min(10, width/4) — corner-radius handle inset offset

inventory.name: shapeRect
inventory.user: Lets you move, resize and round-corner a rect
inventory.how: registry entry: geomOf.rect; 8 scale handles + rx ctrl (bijective inset); edit emits only changed attrs

inventory.name: shapeCircle
inventory.user: Lets you move and resize a circle
inventory.how: registry entry: geomOf.circle; move writes cx/cy; 4 handles; edit sets r from drag distance

inventory.name: shapeEllipse
inventory.user: Lets you move and resize an ellipse
inventory.how: registry entry: geomOf.ellipse; rotatable; 4 scale + 4 ctrl handles; edit writes changed rx/ry

inventory.name: shapeLine
inventory.user: Lets you move a line or drag either endpoint
inventory.how: registry entry: geomOf.line; move shifts both endpoints by delta; edit writes x/y per endpoint key

inventory.name: svgShapes
inventory.how: array literal collecting the six shape registry entries

inventory.name: shapeLookup
inventory.how: forMode find by mode; forTag scans tag match + try reads(), falls through to null (offers gizmo)

inventory.name: handleEdit
inventory.how: resolve entry via shapeLookup.forMode, find handle by key, return entry.edit(...) attr writes

inventory.name: hPieces
inventory.how: md section heading for target/writer/overlay/focus

inventory.name: svgTarget
inventory.how: finds the runtime Variable owning a node, parses its param alias, slices literalSpan to expose doc/elems

inventory.name: holeSpans
inventory.how: scans text for `${` and brace-depth-matches the closing `}` to locate interpolation holes

inventory.name: slotsOf
inventory.how: splits text into num/hole slots via NUM regex between holeSpans, sorted by start

inventory.name: mergeInterpolated
inventory.how: reconciles numeric slots in source against rendered/nextRendered number arrays; keeps holes, reports locked slots

inventory.name: settle
inventory.how: async-polls variable._value every 8ms until it changes from previous, up to 80 tries

inventory.name: svgWriter
inventory.user: Dragging a shape rewrites the SVG source, one undo per gesture
inventory.how: realize+self.define redefines cell; commit/commitMany/runCommand route puts through lenses; three sinks (literal/upstream/locked); emits lens-put

inventory.name: svgOverlay
inventory.user: Selection handles, guides and previews drawn over the drawing
inventory.how: createElementNS two `<g>` layers (element-space + root-space), CSS style, alignTo via inverse screen-CTM matrix

inventory.name: boxInRoot
inventory.how: maps element getBBox corners into root user space via inverse screen-CTM, returns axis-aligned bounds

inventory.name: topmostPaths
inventory.how: filters out any path that is a descendant prefix of a shorter selected path

inventory.name: zTarget
inventory.how: maps front/back/raise/lower to a clamped target index given from/count

inventory.name: svgFocus
inventory.user: Select shapes/vertices, see handles, multi-select and rotate-pivot
inventory.how: path-address selection set; paint() draws boxes/handles/chips via overlay; rebase across edits; nodeAt/attrVal/vertexAddress

inventory.name: hDelta
inventory.how: md section heading for the delta framework (preview/commit/revert)

inventory.name: grabPointer
inventory.how: node.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId) wrapped in try/catch

inventory.name: gestureDelta
inventory.how: factory of tagged delta constructors (attr/command/clip/select/view/readout) plus text() lens-put

inventory.name: previewDelta
inventory.user: Live preview of the edit while dragging
inventory.how: setAttribute on target elems for attr deltas; adds/replaces keyed overlay view marks; sets cursor

inventory.name: commitDelta
inventory.user: Releasing a drag commits it as one undoable edit
inventory.how: routes deltas to writer.commitMany (all-attr) or per-delta commit/runCommand/clipboard/focus select

inventory.name: revertDelta
inventory.user: Cancelling a drag restores the original attributes
inventory.how: restores each attr delta's `was` value (or removeAttribute), then overlay.clear + focus.refresh

inventory.name: hTools
inventory.how: md`### Tools` section heading describing tool gesture/delta contract

inventory.name: moveVertices
inventory.user: Drag a multi-vertex selection; all move together
inventory.how: parsePath/parsePoints walk, offset selected anchors (and coupled ctrl handles) by dlx/dly, reprint d/points

inventory.name: toolVertex
inventory.user: Grab, drag, band-select, and multi-drag path/polygon vertices
inventory.how: pointer handlers: vertexAddress ordinals, pathSmooth.couple/handleEdit/moveVertices → gestureDelta preview+commit; vband marquee

inventory.name: scopedPath
inventory.how: slice a path to one level below the active scope prefix, else root child

inventory.name: hitTest
inventory.user: Click near a thin stroke still selects it
inventory.how: document.elementsFromPoint first, else sample getPointAtLength via getScreenCTM within px tolerance

inventory.name: snapRects
inventory.user: Dragged shape snaps to neighbours' edges/centres with guides
inventory.how: compare moving box edge/centre lines to others within tol, emit dx/dy and guide segments

inventory.name: moveTargetOf
inventory.how: build move target: invert parent/element CTMs (Slin/Elin), read transform text and translateLens base

inventory.name: moveDeltas
inventory.how: map screen delta through Elin/Slin to shape-native attrs or transform; null-edit skip; gestureDelta.attr

inventory.name: toolMove
inventory.user: Drag shapes, snap, axis-lock, and alt-drag to duplicate
inventory.how: pointer handlers: pick+moveTargetOf targets, threshold dead-zone, snapRects hysteresis, moveDeltas; alt uses copy/offset/pasteMarkup

inventory.name: toolZoom
inventory.user: Wheel to zoom, middle-drag to pan the canvas
inventory.how: onWheel ctx.zoomAt(pow), middle-button onPointerDown pan via ctx.panBy

inventory.name: toolScope
inventory.user: Double-click into a group to edit its children
inventory.how: onDblClick: scopedPath one level deeper, ctx.setScope, re-pick, commit select delta

inventory.name: toolMarquee
inventory.user: Rubber-band select multiple shapes on empty canvas
inventory.how: pointer band via dragBox overlay rect, rootBox intersection test, scopedPath dedupe, gestureDelta.select commit

inventory.name: toolStructure
inventory.user: Double-click to insert/delete path & polygon points or add shapes
inventory.how: onDblClick dispatches on focus.mode: insert/deletePoint, insert/deletePathPoint, insertElement via gestureDelta.command

inventory.name: toolTransform
inventory.user: Drag gizmo handles to scale, rotate, and move the pivot
inventory.how: pointer handlers: rotateAbout/scaleAbout on opsLens, alt-symmetric, shift-snap angle/aspect; preview+commit transform delta

inventory.name: dragBox
inventory.how: normalise two corners to {x,y,width,height,x1,y1}; optional square constraint

inventory.name: shapeSpec
inventory.how: map kind+corners (via dragBox) to {tag,attrs} for rect/ellipse/line with default fill/stroke

inventory.name: shapeMarkup
inventory.how: serialise shapeSpec's {tag,attrs} to an SVG element string

inventory.name: penPath
inventory.how: pen path-string builder: start/lineTo/curveTo/mirror/close helpers for M/L/C/Z d-strings

inventory.name: toolDraw
inventory.user: Drag to draw a rectangle, ellipse or line
inventory.how: pointer handlers build a live overlay.addRoot preview; on release ctx.addShape + gestureDelta.select commits the new shape

inventory.name: toolPen
inventory.user: Draw Bezier paths by clicking anchors and dragging handles
inventory.how: pointer down/move/up build the `d` attr via penPath (lineTo/curveTo/close); freeEnd resumes an open path, near-start closes it

inventory.name: fitCurve
inventory.how: Schneider least-squares cubic-Bezier fitting: chord param, Newton reparam, corner-angle splitting, recursive subdivide on max error

inventory.name: toolScribble
inventory.user: Freehand-draw a stroke that smooths into a clean path
inventory.how: collect decimated polyline points, run fitCurve to Bezier segments, emit an M/C `d` and ctx.addShape a path

inventory.name: hHarness
inventory.how: md`### The gesture-law harness` heading plus one descriptive sentence

inventory.name: gestureFixture
inventory.how: one reused runtime.module + realize()d source mounts a lens node; exposes doc/elems/historyDepth/boxGap probes and lens-put put log

inventory.name: playGesture
inventory.how: dispatch synthetic PointerEvent/Wheel/Keyboard, wait quiet-until-idle on puts; tap/drag/hold/dblclick/wheel/press step builders

inventory.name: gestureCorpus
inventory.how: object literal of SVG test strings (basic/residue/broken) plus named hit-point coordinates

inventory.name: withFixture
inventory.how: Promise-queue serialises mount → run fn → destroy so co-located fixtures never share a hit-test screen

inventory.name: test_gesture_identity
inventory.how: T1: null taps and cancelled drags leave doc/elemCount/historyDepth unchanged; domShape live==fromSource after cancel

inventory.name: test_gesture_path_independence
inventory.how: T2: straight vs 5-leg wander drag to same endpoint must commit identical bytes, both axis-locked and free

inventory.name: test_gesture_commits_against_its_origin
inventory.how: T4: marquee two elements, drag; assert every selected box moved same delta in exactly one undo entry

inventory.name: test_gesture_confinement
inventory.how: T6: a false-returning tool at head or tail of the registry leaves the committed result identical to baseline

inventory.name: test_gesture_selection_is_not_an_edit
inventory.how: T9: marquee bands select elements but never change doc or historyDepth; empty band leaves no selection

inventory.name: test_tools_measure_through_ctx
inventory.how: regex tool handler .toString() for banned geometry APIs (getBBox/getScreenCTM…) vs required ctx.* measurements

inventory.name: test_tools_write_through_the_delta
inventory.how: regex handlers: setAttribute only on overlay.add-owned nodes, and no ctx.writer.commit/runCommand outside commitDelta

inventory.name: domShape
inventory.how: recursive {tag,attrs,kids} serialiser excluding overlay/style; live(node) vs fromSource(text) via DOMParser JSON compare

inventory.name: test_gesture_render_consistency
inventory.how: T5: after move/gizmo/vertex gestures assert live==fromSource and boxGap<1.5px, incl. a shape inside a transformed group

inventory.name: test_gesture_rebase_agreement
inventory.how: withFixture runs 7 structural commands; asserts each command's rebase maps every old address to the same element or drops it

inventory.name: test_gesture_partiality
inventory.how: playGesture tap/dblclick on unreadable polygon+arc corpus; asserts doc/elemCount unchanged and handles offered but no guessed edit

inventory.name: test_gesture_view_is_not_an_edit
inventory.how: playGesture wheel/pan/fit assert no source write or undo; same drag commits identical bytes at zoom 1 and 2.5

inventory.name: test_gesture_hit_agreement
inventory.how: compares hover rect box to selection box within 1.5px per point; verifies group descend/ascend and stroke-only hittability

inventory.name: gestureLaws
inventory.how: object mapping T1–T11 names to test fns with async run() awaiting each and catching failures into a results map

inventory.name: frameBudget
inventory.how: requestAnimationFrame sampling focusPaths/boxGap/scale through a drag; asserts selection held, overlay <2px, no scale flash (B3)

inventory.name: hCommands
inventory.how: md`### Commands and affordances` section heading

inventory.name: toolHover
inventory.user: Outlines the shape under the cursor before you click
inventory.how: onHover ctx.pick→previewDelta gestureDelta.view rect.hover box (skips already-selected); clears outline on onPointerLeave

inventory.name: viewof svgTools
inventory.how: Inputs.input([...tools]) reactive array registry, toolAffordance first so chip presses are claimed before handle/move tools

inventory.name: toolAffordance
inventory.user: Drag chips/handles on a selection to edit it
inventory.how: onPointerDown reads dataset.aff, grabPointer + drag preview/commit via provider; dispatches command or tap; onCancel reverts

inventory.name: cmdGroup
inventory.user: Group selected shapes into a <g> (Mod-g)
inventory.how: plan() groupPlan siblings check→gestureDelta.command(groupElements) with rebaseMoves mapping members inside new group

inventory.name: cmdUngroup
inventory.user: Dissolve selected group(s) back into shapes (Mod-Shift-g)
inventory.how: filter unblocked groups, descending sort, per-group gestureDelta.command(ungroupElements) with rebaseMoves spreading children

inventory.name: cmdDuplicate
inventory.user: Duplicate selected shapes offset by a nudge (Mod-d)
inventory.how: copyMarkup→offsetMarkup→pasteMarkup appended at end; rebase null (no address moves), select new copies

inventory.name: cmdCopy
inventory.user: Copy selection to the clipboard (Mod-c)
inventory.how: gestureDelta.clip(copyMarkup(env.src, env.paths))

inventory.name: cmdCut
inventory.user: Cut selection to the clipboard (Mod-x)
inventory.how: gestureDelta.clip then descending-order deleteElement commands each with rebasePath delete; last clears selection

inventory.name: cmdPaste
inventory.user: Paste clipboard, offset or in place (Mod-v / Mod-Shift-v)
inventory.how: factory (inPlace)=>cmd; pasteMarkup into scope parent at childCount, offsetMarkup unless in-place; select pasted

inventory.name: alignSpecs
inventory.how: literal array of [id,label,axis,frac] tuples describing the six align commands

inventory.name: cmdAlign
inventory.user: Align 2+ shapes to a common edge or centre
inventory.how: factory over spec; compute target edge from box min/max/mid, emit moveDeltas per shape with 1e-4 quantise

inventory.name: cmdDistribute
inventory.user: Distribute shapes evenly by centre spacing
inventory.how: plan() computes equal gaps between sorted centres, fans out moveDeltas per element with 1e-4 quantization

inventory.name: pathSmooth
inventory.how: handle-based path algebra: smooth-anchor detection, mirrored handle coupling, L↔C promote/demote, smooth/corner toggle via attrTextLens.put

inventory.name: cmdToggleSmooth
inventory.user: Toggle a path vertex between smooth and corner
inventory.how: command gating on one selected anchor; delegates to pathSmooth.toggle inside gestureDelta.command, declines when null (T8)

inventory.name: cmdDeleteVertex
inventory.user: Delete selected path/polygon vertices
inventory.how: maps anchors to deletePoint/deletePathPoint deltas via pathSegments/pathHandles; guards polygon min-2; one element at a time

inventory.name: cmdClosePath
inventory.user: Close or open selected paths
inventory.how: regex-append/strip trailing Z on the d attribute via attrTextLens; skips already-as-asked paths (T1)

inventory.name: cmdSelect
inventory.user: Select all / none / same-fill / same-tag
inventory.how: factory keyed by kind; filters container children by fill/tag match, emits gestureDelta.select of paths

inventory.name: pathConvert
inventory.how: segment-kind conversion registry (L/C/Q/A); endpoint→cubic arc parameterisation; absoluteGroup before S/T neighbours; replaceGroup rewrite

inventory.name: cmdConvertSegment
inventory.user: Straighten/curve/quadratic-ize a path segment
inventory.how: maps selected anchors to segment indices, fans out gestureDelta.command calling pathConvert.convert, re-reads node per commit

inventory.name: cmdAddGradient
inventory.user: Fill a shape with a new linear gradient
inventory.how: mintId a linearGradient, defsInsert it, point fill at url(#id) via setProperty+attrTextLens.put

inventory.name: cmdAddMarker
inventory.user: Add an arrowhead marker to a stroked path
inventory.how: mintId a marker, defsInsert it, set marker-end to url(#id) via setProperty+attrTextLens.put

inventory.name: svgCommands
inventory.how: plain array concatenating all command specs (group/align/distribute/vertex/select/convert/gradient/marker) — headless-testable, no view

inventory.name: svgAffordances
inventory.user: On-shape chips: duplicate, swap paint, stroke-width drag, path verbs, gradient/marker
inventory.how: array of affordance specs with applies/glyph/tap/drag; commits through ctx.node.setField, re-reading node each write; command-backed chips

inventory.name: commandLookup
inventory.how: byId finder plus forEvent keyboard matcher parsing Mod-/Shift-/Alt- key strings against event modifiers

inventory.name: svgTools
inventory.how: viewof value: (G,_) => G.input(_)

inventory.name: hAssembly
inventory.how: md`### Assembly` section heading

inventory.name: lensState
inventory.how: new Map() — per-Variable shared editor state that outlives remounts

inventory.name: svgLens
inventory.user: The editor itself: attach interactive SVG editing to a node
inventory.how: factory wiring target/writer/overlay/focus, zoom/pan view, tool dispatch, live-ctx facade routing to current node, MutationObserver view handover

overlaps.job: Edit the selected shape's attributes / paint (fill, stroke, width, opacity)
overlaps.recommendation: Merge into one properties panel driven by the svgFields registry with a single setField write path; drop inspector's separate setAttr path.
Have the double-click handler dispatch the cmdDeleteVertex command rather than re-building deletePoint/deletePathPoint deltas itself; one delete implementation, two triggers.

overlaps.job: Capture and display lens-put events with law checks
overlaps.recommendation: Feed one shared put-log buffer and render everywhere through the reusable lawBadges component; remove putTable/sinkRecord's independent listeners and bespoke tables.

overlaps.job: Add a <defs> entry and point an attribute at url(#id)
overlaps.recommendation: Extract one helper (mintId + defsInsert + setProperty at url(#id)) parameterised by def markup and target attribute; both commands become thin callers.

overlaps.job: Copy, offset and paste a duplicate of the selection
overlaps.recommendation: Share one offset-paste routine; cmdDuplicate becomes copy-then-invoke cmdPaste with offset, removing the repeated copyMarkup->offsetMarkup->pasteMarkup chain.

overlaps.job: Find the segment of a shape nearest a point
overlaps.recommendation: Unify into one nearest-segment routine over a normalized segment list (pathSegments already normalizes both polygon edges and path curves).
